title: Day 18: Day 18 — First 90 Days
content:
# Day 18 — First 90 Days

## Topic
Designing the first 90 days to lock in retention and momentum

## 3–5 Key Points
- **The first 90 days are the retention window:** Early experience shapes whether an agent feels confident, supported, and committed.
- **Use a first-week checklist:** Get branding, systems access, training, introductions, and production expectations handled immediately.
- **Set goals together:** Define clear activity and performance targets so the agent knows what success looks like.
- **Create regular check-ins:** Weekly touchpoints catch problems early and keep momentum from fading.
- **Balance onboarding with production:** Training matters, but agents also need fast wins and a path to real business.

## Why It Matters
Recruiting doesn’t end at the signed agreement. A strong first 90 days reduces early attrition, builds trust, and helps new agents become productive faster—turning a successful hire into a lasting one.
